name: tile
title: Tile
description: A bordered, padded surface for grouping related content. Use for dashboard cards, summary panels, list items in a card grid, or any rectangle of content that needs a consistent visual rhythm. The wrapper re-exports `Card` and its slots.

meta.docs:
# Tile

A bordered, padded surface for grouping related content. Use for dashboard cards, summary panels, list items in a card grid, or any rectangle of content that needs a consistent visual rhythm. The wrapper re-exports `Card` and its slots.

## When to use

- **Static content container** ‚Äî compose `<Card>` with `<CardHeader>` / `<CardTitle>` / `<CardDescription>` / `<CardContent>` / `<CardFooter>` slots; padding (`px-6`, `py-6`) is built in.
- **Action button next to a title** ‚Äî use `<CardAction>` inside `<CardHeader>`; auto-positioned top-right via grid.
- **Clickable tile** ‚Äî `<Card role="button" tabIndex={0} onClick onKeyDown className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors">` (or `asChild` with a real `<button>`/`<a>` for native semantics).
- **Selectable tile** ‚Äî track `selected` state, set `data-state` and a `border-primary` class. Use `role="radiogroup"`/`role="radio"` for accessibility.
- **Expandable tile** ‚Äî wrap `<Card>` in shadcn `<Collapsible>`, place a chevron button in `<CardAction>`, body in `<CollapsibleContent>`.
- **Flat / borderless variant** ‚Äî `<Card className="rounded-none border-0 shadow-none">` matches Carbon's flatter default.

## When not to use

- **Modal-like overlays** ‚Äî use `Dialog` or `Modal`.
- **Inline status messaging** ‚Äî use `Alert` (`InlineNotification` / `Callout`).
- **Plain `<div>` containers without visual chrome** ‚Äî use a `<div>`; `Card` always carries border + shadow.

## Composition

- Carbon's five tile variants (`Tile`, `ClickableTile`, `SelectableTile`, `RadioTile`, `ExpandableTile`) all collapse to one primitive ‚Äî `Card` ‚Äî plus composition for click/select/expand behaviour.
- Use `<CardHeader>` even with no title slot: it provides the `@container/card-header` query and standard padding for any content placed at the top.
- Don't migrate Carbon `Tile` to a generic `<div>` ‚Äî `Card` ensures consistent padding/border/shadow tokens with the rest of the design system.
meta.migrationGuide:
# Tile ‚Äî Carbon ‚Üí shadcn migration guide ## Variants and naming Carbon ships **five tile variants** ‚Äî each is its own component: - `Tile` ‚Äî basic content container (a styled `
`). - `ClickableTile` ‚Äî adds click handling, focus ring, hover state. - `SelectableTile` ‚Äî single-select tile (acts like a radio). - `RadioTile` ‚Äî explicit radio-tile (used inside `TileGroup`). - `ExpandableTile` ‚Äî collapsible tile with an expander button. shadcn ships **one** primitive ‚Äî `Card` ‚Äî and you compose hover/click/select/expand behaviours yourself. The wrapper re-exports the canonical `Card` family from `card/`. ## Structural differences Carbon's `Tile` is a plain `
` container; you fill it however you like. shadcn's `Card` is **decomposed**: explicit `CardHeader` / `CardTitle` / `CardDescription` / `CardContent` / `CardFooter` / `CardAction` slots provide a consistent visual rhythm. Your title/description/content/footer have specific semantic roles. | Concept | Carbon | shadcn | |---|---|---| | Wrapper | `` | `` | | Title | not modeled (use a raw `

`) | `` | | Subtitle / description | not modeled (use a `

`) | `` | | Body content | direct children | `` | | Footer / actions | not modeled (use a manual flex row) | `` | | Action button in header | not modeled | `` (auto-positioned via grid `col-start-2`) | | Padding | manual (Carbon's `Tile` has no default padding; user must add `className`) | built-in via `CardHeader` / `CardContent` / `CardFooter` (`px-6` + `py-6` on the root) | | Border | none by default | `border` token always on | | Shadow | none by default | `shadow-sm` token always on | | Background | `bg-layer-01` (Carbon layer system) | `bg-card` | | Border radius | square (0) | `rounded-xl` (~12px) | | Clickable | `` separate component | `` (manual a11y) | | Selectable | `` separate component | manual: track `selected` state, toggle `data-state` + visual classes | | Radio (single-select group) | `` | use shadcn `` with custom item rendering | | Expandable | `` separate component | use shadcn `` (separate primitive ‚Äî not yet wrapped) | | Light variant | `light` boolean | `bg-card` token swap | ## Carbon features missing in shadcn - **``** ‚Äî Carbon ships a clickable variant with focus ring + click handling baked in. shadcn requires manual composition: `role="button"`, `tabIndex={0}`, `onClick`, `onKeyDown` for Enter/Space, and a hover class. - **`` / `` / ``** ‚Äî Carbon's "tiles as form controls" family. shadcn requires composing with `` (separate primitive) + custom item rendering. - **``** ‚Äî Carbon's collapsible-tile pattern. shadcn requires composing with `` (a shadcn primitive that's not yet wrapped in this design system; pull via `npx shadcn add collapsible`). - **`light` prop** ‚Äî Carbon's "light layer" treatment. shadcn: theme tokens (`bg-card` automatically swaps). - **``** ‚Äî Carbon ships a skeleton variant. shadcn has none ‚Äî use the generic `skeleton` primitive in a Card shape. - **No built-in title/description structure** ‚Äî Carbon's `Tile` is a blank container; shadcn's `Card` enforces a header/footer rhythm with first-class slots. ## shadcn features missing in Carbon - **`` / `` / `` / ``** ‚Äî first-class slots with consistent typography and spacing. Carbon expects you to use raw elements. - **``** ‚Äî auto-positioned action button slot (top-right via grid `col-start-2 row-span-2`). Useful for "edit" / "more" buttons inline with the title. Carbon requires manual flex layout. - **Built-in padding** ‚Äî `CardHeader`/`CardContent`/`CardFooter` handle their own padding (`px-6`). Carbon's `Tile` has none ‚Äî every consumer adds `p-N` themselves. - **Built-in border + shadow** ‚Äî out of the box, you get a styled card without writing classes. Carbon's tile is unstyled. - **`@container/card-header`** ‚Äî `CardHeader` is a CSS container, so you can use `@container` queries inside it for responsive layouts. Carbon has no equivalent. - **`[.border-b]:pb-6` / `[.border-t]:pt-6` selectors** ‚Äî `CardHeader` adds bottom padding when it has a `border-b`, `CardFooter` adds top padding when it has a `border-t`. Tiny but very nice. - **Tailwind composability** ‚Äî every part accepts `className`; restyle inline. ## Behavioural differences - **Default element** ‚Äî Both: `

`. - **Default padding** ‚Äî Carbon: 0 (you add it). shadcn: `py-6` on the root, `px-6` on each section. - **Default border** ‚Äî Carbon: 0 (you add it). shadcn: 1px theme border always on. - **Default shadow** ‚Äî Carbon: 0. shadcn: `shadow-sm` always on (override with `shadow-none` if needed). - **Default radius** ‚Äî Carbon: 0 (square). shadcn: `rounded-xl` (~12px). - **Default gap between sections** ‚Äî Carbon: none (no sections). shadcn: `gap-6` between `CardHeader`/`CardContent`/`CardFooter`. ## Migration checklist 1. Replace `{content}` with `` + appropriate slots: - Title ‚Üí `{title}` - Subtitle ‚Üí `` inside `` - Body ‚Üí `{body}` - Buttons / actions ‚Üí `{buttons}` 2. Drop the manual `p-N` class ‚Äî `Card`'s built-in padding (`py-6` + `px-6` per section) replaces it. 3. For ``: use ` { if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); ‚Ä¶ } }} className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors">`. Or use `asChild` with a real `
